TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Umitan go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 892.99 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 817.5 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 74.18 km¬≤), 4,278 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,090 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,032 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 94%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Umitan go ays psgayun 6 ru 15 alang. 15 alang hani ga, Kanahcian , Kanaluk , Bacingul , Kamcing , Kusunuki , Haitutuan , Takinusta , Sulai-iaz , Samuluh , Tuapuu , Takimi , Likau-uan , Bulbul , Vahu , Litu .
S.PHON: umitan …£o mki s~…ēku taituŇč. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.* km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km*), *,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *,*** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na ő≤unun ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u umitan …£o ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun * ru ** alaŇč. ** alaŇč ńßani …£a, kanańß ¶~ ®ian , kanaluk , ő≤a ¶~ ®iŇčul , kam ¶~ ®iŇč , kus~…ēunuki , ńßaitutuan , takinus~…ēta , s~…ēulai-iaz , s~…ēamuluńß , tuapuu , takimi , likau-uan , ő≤ulő≤ul , *ańßu , litu .
S.FORM: Umitan go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 892.99 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 817.5 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 74.18 km¬≤), 4,278 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,090 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,032 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 94%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Umitan go ays psgayun 6 ru 15 alang. 15 alang hani ga, Kanahcian , Kanaluk , Bacingul , Kamcing , Kusunuki , Haitutuan , Takinusta , Sulai-iaz , Samuluh , Tuapuu , Takimi , Likau-uan , Bulbul , Vahu , Litu .
